notes: SU requests data service; Serving RFSS sends MIPv4 RegReq to Home
Network-side trigger to activate SNDCP context on behalf of SU
SU tears down context; Serving RFSS sends MIPv4 Deregistration (Lifetime=0)
e.g. MRC Standby Timer expiry; sends Deregistration to Home
Uses SIP REGISTER to signal Serving RFSS, which then deregisters
Home queries Serving for current context state
Serving queries Home for current context state

Subscriber roams to new Serving RFSS; new RFSS registers (S=0) with Home; Home tears down old Forward Tunnel; old RFSS receives SIP REGISTER-deregister and sends Lifetime=0. After transfer first IP packet in each direction MUST use full uncompressed header (header compression resync).
S=1; retains simultaneous binding during exchange

procedure: Race Condition (old RFSS renewal during transfer)
notes: Old RFSS renewal (S=1) arrives during context transfer; Home briefly holds simultaneous bindings to both old and new; resolves when old RFSS sends Deregistration (Lifetime=0) after receiving SIP REGISTER-deregister
